# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Dive into Dark Genesis, where two player games meet apocalyptic storytelling. Experience intense cooperative gameplay in a moody, immersive world. Start your genesis now.

### Gameplay
https://example.com/gameplay
Discover revolutionary gameplay mechanics built for teamwork. Dark Genesis delivers thrilling games to play with strategic combat, skill trees, and immersive challenges.

### World
https://example.com/world
Journey through a haunting genesis world filled with dramatic lore, mysterious factions, and breathtaking environments. Uncover secrets in every shadow you explore.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Connect with Dark Genesis developers and fellow players. Get support, share feedback, or join our community for exclusive updates on new 2 player games content.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Dark Genesis

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - Dark Genesis

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - Dark Genesis
